race.comment: LOLITA (14) got off the mark stylishly two back and then followed it up with a strong closing third last time. Has been kept on the fresh side for this and draws the A1. Bold showing anticipated. PERMISSION GRANTED (5) strips fitter second-up and can improve sharply. Expect him to burn across from the draw and give a sight. SPILLS (1) has been freshened up since turning in a poor one at Grafton. Drops back in trip and gets help under the big weight with the 3kg claimer sticking. Capable of a sharp bounce back. ENHANCE (7) doesn't boast the best winning strike rate but ran a nice race last time out, finishing third over 1000m here when he did his best work late. Only needs to hold his form to be right there again. ON MY COMMAND (11) is lightly raced but on the up.
